nasb.text: You shall take the atonement money from the sons of Israel and shall give it for the service of the tent of meeting, that it may be a memorial for the sons of Israel before the Lord, to make atonement for yourselves.”

esv.text: You shall take the atonement money from the people of Israel and shall give it for the service of the tent of meeting, that it may bring the people of Israel to remembrance before the Lord, so as to make atonement for your lives.”

cnv.text: 你要從以色列人收取這贖銀，指定作會幕事奉的使用，好使它在耶和華面前為以色列人作個記念，也贖回你們的性命。”

ccb.text: 要向以色列人收赎命的款项，供会幕使用，可以使以色列人在耶和华面前蒙眷顾，赎性命。”
